data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. All three requested features (--remove, --dry-run, --help) implemented correctly in scripts/install.sh with proper argument parsing, atomic file operations for removal, and comprehensive dry-run support. Tests cover full lifecycle and help output (2/2 pass). README documented. All quality gates pass (lint 0 errors, typecheck clean, tests green, build succeeds). No security issues or regressions.
